meta.title: SunBronze Front Desk
meta.description: Receptionist and admin interface for SunBronze scheduling and WhatsApp operations.

common.signInAgain: Sign in again to load this section.

shell.subtitle: Coordinate appointments, customers, and WhatsApp handoffs from one calm workspace.

dashboard.title: Front Desk Dashboard
dashboard.activitySubtitle: Clinic moments that need calm follow-through.
activities: Elena Rossi finished HydraFacial with Dr. Claire.
Michael Vance requested an initial consultation.
WhatsApp thread is waiting for front desk review.
dashboard.staffSubtitle: Live staff coverage for the reception desk.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.emptyBody: No bookings were found between {start} and {end}. Add a new appointment to populate this board.

customers.title: Customer Search
customers.panelSubtitle: Live staff lookup results from the backend.
customers.emptyBody: The staff lookup endpoint is reachable, but it did not return customer records for this environment.

conversations.title: Conversations Inbox
conversations.lanesSubtitle: Live conversation states ordered by latest activity.
conversations.emptyBody: The staff conversations endpoint is reachable, but no conversation records were returned.
conversations.threadSubtitle: Most recent conversation with stored WhatsApp messages.
conversations.noStoredMessages: No stored messages are linked to this conversation yet.
conversations.noSelectedBody: When conversations exist, the most recent thread appears here for triage.

services.title: Services & Staff
services.serviceMapSubtitle: Live service catalog and scheduling requirements.
services.emptyServicesBody: The services endpoint is reachable, but no service records were returned.
services.staffSubtitle: Active barbers available to schedule against services.
services.emptyStaffBody: The barber endpoint did not return active staff records for this environment.

systemUsers.title: System Users
systemUsers.panelSubtitle: Manage access, roles, and status for the internal team.
systemUsers.passwordHelp: Leave password blank to keep the current one when editing.
systemUsers.emptyBody: Create the first user to manage internal team access.
systemUsers.deactivateError: Could not change the user status.
systemUsers.sessionRequired: Sign in again to manage users.

login.title: Front desk sign in.
login.body: Sign in with your staff credentials to access dashboard, appointments, customer, and conversation pages.
login.loginFailed: Login failed. Please verify your credentials.
login.networkError: Could not complete sign in. Please try again.

dev.title: Developer Reports
dev.emptyTitle: Dev auth or API data not available
dev.emptyBody: This report page logs in with SUNBRONZE_DEV_EMAIL and SUNBRONZE_DEV_PASSWORD on the server, then reads the protected WhatsApp endpoints. Add those values in frontend/.env.local if the defaults are not valid for your environment.
dev.messagesSubtitle: Latest inbound and outbound traffic captured by the platform.
dev.conversationsSubtitle: Conversation states and intent transitions for WhatsApp interactions.
dev.remindersSubtitle: Reminder queue visibility for WhatsApp-linked appointment notifications.
